final:
module top_module(input logic rstn,
           input logic clk,
           output reg div);always @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) 
       if (!rstn)
          div <= 0;
       else
          div <= !div;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (rstn) begin
        div <= 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
